title: Use standard Tailwind classes for colors
requirement: Colors should use standard Tailwind semantic classes instead of hard-coded hex values
preferred_pattern: Use Tailwind classes like text-gray-900 bg-gray-50 text-blue-600 for semantic color roles
anti_pattern: Do not scatter raw hex values like #333 or #F5F6F8 directly in template or style
notes: Prefer semantic names over visual names

title: Prefer semantic Tailwind classes over visual color names
requirement: Color classes should express role rather than arbitrary hex or visual-only names
preferred_pattern: Use role-based Tailwind classes: text-gray-900 for primary text, bg-gray-50 for page background
anti_pattern: Do not use appearance-only names or hex values when a semantic Tailwind class exists
notes: Use during refactors and new component audits

title: Avoid Tailwind arbitrary color values when standard class exists
requirement: Avoid bg-[#F5F6F8] or text-[#333] when a standard class like bg-gray-50 or text-gray-900 exists
preferred_pattern: Use standard Tailwind color classes; only use arbitrary values when no standard class matches
anti_pattern: Do not use bg-[#hex] or text-[#hex] as steady-state pattern when Tailwind has a matching class
notes: If migration is required, document the temporary exception

title: Use a shared base font family
requirement: Use a consistent font family across the application shell and content areas
preferred_pattern: Configure base font family in Tailwind config or global CSS
anti_pattern: Do not redefine unrelated font families locally
notes: Map to existing project typography tokens if already present

title: Use a finite typography scale
requirement: Font sizes and line heights must come from the enterprise typography scale
preferred_pattern: Use text-xs(12px) text-sm(14px) text-base(16px) text-lg(18px) text-xl(20px) text-2xl(24px) text-3xl(28px)
anti_pattern: Do not mix arbitrary text-[Npx] values inside the same module
notes: Audit repeated one-off text classes

title: Use standard Tailwind spacing classes
requirement: Spacing must use standard Tailwind spacing scale instead of arbitrary values
preferred_pattern: Use Tailwind spacing: 4px->1, 8px->2, 12px->3, 16px->4, 20px->5, 24px->6, 32px->8
anti_pattern: Do not use p-[16px] or gap-[12px] when standard classes exist
notes: Shared spacing should cover layout and component rhythm

title: Map to existing Tailwind config instead of duplicating values
requirement: If Tailwind config already has a matching value use the existing class instead of duplicate arbitrary values
preferred_pattern: Align rule intent to the current token system
anti_pattern: Do not create parallel arbitrary value patterns when equivalent Tailwind classes exist
notes: Important for generalized adoption across codebases

title: Update Tailwind config before mass-replacing values
requirement: If a needed value does not exist in Tailwind config add it to the shared config first then use the class
preferred_pattern: Add or update the closest shared theme layer before mass replacement
anti_pattern: Do not patch repeated arbitrary values one by one without a shared config entry
notes: Use when scaling audits beyond a single page

title: Use brand colors for UI states
requirement: Brand colors: primary #0067D1, hover #2E86DE, success #01AA71, warning #FCC800, danger #E02128, info #2070f3, none #AEAEAE
preferred_pattern: Apply brand colors via Tailwind classes or :deep() scoped overrides for Element Plus
anti_pattern: Do not use hard-coded hex values that differ from brand spec
notes: Applies to custom CSS and Tailwind utilities. For third-party components see FDN-009-TP

title: Override Element Plus component colors with brand colors
requirement: Element Plus components must have default colors overridden to match brand colors via :deep() in scoped styles
preferred_pattern: Use :deep() to override Element Plus CSS variables: --el-button-bg-color: #0067D1; --el-button-hover-bg-color: #2E86DE; cover default hover focus active
anti_pattern: Do not leave Element Plus components using default non-brand colors
notes: REQUIRED: add scoped style overrides with :deep() for el-button el-tag el-input el-select etc. Example: :deep(.el-button--primary) { --el-button-bg-color: #0067D1; --el-button-hover-bg-color: #2E86DE; }

title: Use standard Tailwind neutral color classes
requirement: Neutral colors: text-primary #191919->text-gray-900, text-regular #595959->text-gray-600, link #0067D1->text-blue-600, bg-page #F5F6F8->bg-gray-50, bg-container #FFFFFF->bg-white, border #C9C9C9->border-gray-300, separator #DFDFDF->border-gray-200
preferred_pattern: Use for neutral colors
anti_pattern: Do not use hard-coded hex values for neutral colors
notes: Applies to all neutral color usage. Important: 1) Ensure CSS token definitions are complete in project CSS files 2) Third-party library components do not automatically use CSS variables - custom styles are required to override default component styles

title: Use standard Tailwind typography classes for headings
applies_to: Typography scale font sizes line heights
requirement: Font sizes must use enterprise typography scale: base text-sm(14px), h1 text-2xl(24px), h2 text-xl(20px)
preferred_pattern: Use for typography scale
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes or line heights outside the scale
notes: Applies to all typography

title: Use standard shadow classes
requirement: Shadows must use: shadow-sm, shadow, shadow-2xl
preferred_pattern: Use shadow-sm (small), shadow (medium), shadow-2xl (large)
anti_pattern: Do not use hard-coded box-shadow values
notes: Applies to all shadow usage

title: Use standard border radius classes
requirement: Border radius: 2px->rounded-[2px], 4px->rounded, 8px->rounded-lg
preferred_pattern: Use for border radius
anti_pattern: Do not use hard-coded border-radius values
notes: Applies to all border radius usage

title: Use standard spacing scale for layout rhythm
preferred_pattern: Use for spacing
anti_pattern: Do not use hard-coded spacing values
notes: Applies to all spacing usage

title: Use text-xs (12px) for compact helper text
requirement: Helper text, dropdown options, radio/checkbox labels, tags must use text-xs (12px) with leading-5 (20px)
preferred_pattern: Use font-body-1 or text-xs with normal or medium weight according to component semantics
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes for compact helper content
notes: Applies to compact helper and supporting text

title: Use text-sm (14px) for default interactive components
requirement: Default buttons, tabs, inputs, sidebar items, table body text must use text-sm (14px) with leading-6 (22px)
preferred_pattern: Use font-body-2 or text-sm with normal or medium weight according to component semantics
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes for default interactive components
notes: Applies to default component text

title: Use text-sm font-bold (14px/700) for compact titles
requirement: Table headers, dialog titles, compact section titles must use text-sm font-bold (14px/700)
preferred_pattern: Use font-headline-2 or text-sm with font-bold for compact titles
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes or weights for compact titles
notes: Applies to table headers dialog titles and compact section titles

title: Use text-base font-bold (16px/700) for card titles
applies_to: Emphasized controls navigation and card titles
requirement: Large buttons, level-1 navigation, card titles must use text-base font-bold (16px/700)
preferred_pattern: Use font-headline-2 or text-base with font-bold for emphasized controls navigation and card titles
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes or weights for emphasized controls navigation or card titles
notes: Applies to emphasized controls primary navigation and card titles

title: Use text-2xl font-bold (24px) for main page headings
requirement: Main page headings must use text-2xl font-bold (24px) with leading-8 (32px)
preferred_pattern: Use text-2xl with a compatible heading line height and font-bold
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary font sizes for main page headings
notes: Applies to main page titles and major section headers
